vllm.title: [Bugfix] Ensure LoRA path from the request can be included in err msg
vllm.author: terrytangyuan
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Currently, lora_path is used but it's defined in a try block, which means that if anything fails before this variable is defined, we would not get the error message that we want which includes lora path and name information.
An illustration:
>>> try:
...     raise Exception("failed in try block")
..

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Fix failing transformers dynamic module resolving with spawn multiproc method
vllm.author: Isotr0py
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Issue discussion on Slack: https://vllm-dev.slack.com/archives/C07R5Q1Q2BB/p1739776343893149?thread_ts=1739553140.299949&cid=C07R5Q1Q2BB

transformers backend failed to load custom module on multiproc executor with VLLM_WORKER_MULTIPROC_METHOD=spawn because false-positive loaded custom module.
This

Use ❌ and ❔ instead of ASCII characters
Replace some ❌ with ✅ if features are now supported/compatible
Add vertical-table-header CSS class to make "Feature x Feature" table more readable:

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Handle content type with optional parameters
vllm.author: zifeitong
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Content type is allowed to have multiple optional parameters, e.g. application/json; charset=UTF-8. It's not correctly handled right now.
Follow-up of #13193.

vllm.author: liangfu
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
With base=0, the cos_sin_cache would be initialized with NaN:
self.cos_sin_cache
tensor([[ 1.0000,     nan,     nan,     nan,     nan,     nan,     nan,     nan,
             nan,     nan,     nan,     nan,     nan,     nan,     nan,     nan,
          0.0000,     nan,     nan,     nan,     nan,

vllm.title: [V1][Tests] Adding additional testing for multimodal models to V1
vllm.author: andoorve
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Adding tests for V1 multimodal abort (as requested by @WoosukKwon) as well as load.

vllm.title: [V1] Optimize handling of sampling metadata and req_ids list
vllm.author: njhill
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Move the current SamplingMetadata object to a field in the persistent batch, updated only when the batch changes rather than constructed every step
Keep input_batch.req_ids sized to the number of requests in the batch, so that anywhere that iterates over it doesn't need to slice (copy) the list or k

vllm.title: Pin Ray version to 2.40.0
vllm.author: WoosukKwon
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
It turns out that TP + PP in V1 does not work with Ray 2.41.0 for some reason. 2.40.0 works though.
Just for a record, I got the following error on 2.41.0:
EngineCore hit an exception: Traceback (most recent call last):
ERROR 02-18 01:08:08 core.py:283]   File "/data/woosuk/workspace/vllm/vllm/v1/en

vllm.title: [V1][Spec Decode] Optimize N-gram matching with Numba
vllm.author: WoosukKwon
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR optimizes the N-gram matching algorithm by JIT compiling it with Numba.
I've observed 20-30x speedup with large batch sizes: For ShareGPT benchmark with 5K requests, the cumulative overhead reduces from 54.3 sec to 1.9 sec, which is ~2.5% of the entire running time.

vllm.title: [Misc] Remove dangling references to `--use-v2-block-manager`
vllm.author: hmellor

vllm.title: [Hardware][Gaudi][Feature] Support Contiguous Cache Fetch
vllm.author: zhouyu5
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Contiguous cache fetching to avoid using costly gather operation on Gaudi3. Requires changes in vllm-hpu-extension (HabanaAI/vllm-hpu-extension#17) to work.
Introduces redundant calculations in decoding phase. Feature improves the performance of all tested workloads over the entire benchmark (5-12%)

vllm.title: [perf-benchmark] Allow premerge ECR
vllm.author: khluu
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Use vllm-ci-test-repo if perf benchmark is triggered from PR

vllm.author: divakar-amd
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR add the following moe configs:

MI325 configs Mixtral-8x(7B,22B) TP=(1,2,4,8) FP=(8,16)
MI300 configs qwen1.5_moe_A2.7B TP=(1,2,4,8) fp16
